title: Energizing Sour Croatian Peas Bake
description: A quick, pillowy baked dish of frozen peas with tangy yogurt, smoky paprika, and melted cheese, perfect for a halal-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the frozen peas, plain yogurt, shredded cheese, diced onion, and minced garlic.
Stir in paprika, dried oregano, olive oil, salt, and pepper until evenly mixed.
Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and spread it out in an even layer.
Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it sit for 5 minutes to set.
Serve the dish hot, optionally garnished with fresh parsley or a drizzle of olive oil.
Enjoy a quick, hearty meal that satisfies with a tangy, creamy finish.
